allow: Bash(git -C /c/Workspace/chat-server add app/config.py tests/test_config.py && git -C /c/Workspace/chat-server commit -m "feat: add application settings with env var support")
Bash(git -C /c/Workspace/chat-server add app/schema.py tests/test_schema.py && git -C /c/Workspace/chat-server commit -m "feat: add Pydantic request/response schemas")
Bash(git -C /c/Workspace/chat-server add app/main.py tests/test_api.py && git -C /c/Workspace/chat-server commit -m "feat: add FastAPI endpoints for chat and history")
Bash(git -C /c/Workspace/chat-server add README.md && git -C /c/Workspace/chat-server commit -m "docs: add README with setup instructions")
Bash(curl -s http://localhost:11434/api/tags 2>/dev/null | head -5 || echo "Ollama not running")
Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8000/chat -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"user_id": "user1", "message": "안녕하세요! 제 이름은 철수입니다."}' | python -m json.tool)
Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8000/chat -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d "{\\"user_id\\": \\"user1\\", \\"message\\": \\"안녕하세요! 제 이름은 철수입니다.\\"}")

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8000/chat -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d "{\\"user_id\\": \\"user1\\", \\"thread_id\\": \\"2e73c261-7756-4235-94e5-cbeb27f4ad4d\\", \\"message\\": \\"제 이름이 뭐라고 했죠?\\"}")
Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8000/chat -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d "{\\"user_id\\": \\"user2\\", \\"message\\": \\"hello, what is 1+1?\\"}")

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8000/chat -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d "{\\"user_id\\": \\"user2\\", \\"thread_id\\": \\"779aa865-8d2d-4a9b-86a1-99e653e348d0\\", \\"message\\": \\"what did I just ask you?\\"}")
